# kCGImagePropertyPNGCompressionFilter

**Global Variable**

The PNG filter to apply prior to compression.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyPNGCompressionFilter: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value of this key is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber]. The number contains a bitwise-OR of one or more filter constants, such as [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/IMAGEIO_PNG_FILTER_AVG] or [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/IMAGEIO_PNG_FILTER_SUB]. The value has no effect on formats other than PNG.

## Pre-Compression Filters

- **IMAGEIO_PNG_NO_FILTERS**: No PNG filters.
- **IMAGEIO_PNG_FILTER_NONE**: A filter in which each byte is unchanged.
- **IMAGEIO_PNG_FILTER_SUB**: A filter in which each byte is replaced with the difference between it and the corresponding byte to its left.
- **IMAGEIO_PNG_FILTER_UP**: A filter in which each byte is replaced with the difference between it and the byte above it.
- **IMAGEIO_PNG_FILTER_AVG**: A filter in which each byte is replaced with the difference between it and the average of the bytes above it and to its left.
- **IMAGEIO_PNG_FILTER_PAETH**: A filter in which each byte is replaced with the difference between it and the Paeth predictor of the bytes to its left, above, and upper left.
